reference: Hi, I see I am having black spots, kind of moles, on my body, and they appear to be increasing. I have two-three on my face and many on my body. Is there any way to remove them at home using natural methods? I suspect it to be dermatosis papulosa nigra from browsing the internet.
text: Hi, I see I am having black spots, kind of moles. Body, and they appear to be increasing; I have 2-3 on my face and many on my body. Is there any way to remove them at home using natural methods? I suspect it to be dermatosis papulosa negra from browsing the internet.
